creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Eugene Grosbein from comment #3)
I understand your usage scenario very well, because that's what I do as well.  When you encounter this problem, correct reaction should be "whoa, I haven't updated this library in ages, perhaps I should do it first", not polluting ports with ad-hoc, hard to maintain constraints that would very likely be removed upon the next update as "some old cruft".
